title: Stunning Multicolor Peppy Birthday Happy Birthday Foil Banner (365cm) - Vibrant & Unique Party Decor for Unforgettable Celebration - 1 Pc
features: MULTICOLOR DESIGN: Bring your party to life with the peppy birthday stunning foil banner, featuring vibrant multicolor letters that will add a splash of excitement and cheerfulness to any birthday celebration.
HIGH-QUALITY FOIL MATERIAL: Made with durable and shiny foil material, our peppy birthday banner is designed to catch the eye and create a memorable focal point for your party décor.

IDEAL FOR ALL AGES: Perfect for children, teens, and adults alike, the peppy birthday multicolor happy birthday foil banner is designed to make everyone feel special on their big day, ensuring a fun and unforgettable experience for all.

EFFORTLESS SETUP: Easy to use and assemble, the peppy birthday foil banner offers a hassle-free decoration experience; simply thread the included string through the holes and hang it to create a stunning birthday display in no time.

UNFORGETTABLE CELEBRATION: Transform your venue into a perfect setting for a memorable celebration with our unique, eye-catching birthday banner that will leave your guests talking about it for days to come.
description: Create eye-catching birthday decor with our Blue Foil "Happy Birthday" Banner - 12 ft. This product features a foil party banner that come in blue with multicolor "Happy Birthday", confetti, and party hat prints. An awesome addition to your party; hang from walls, tables, windows, or other surfaces to create a warm and lovely party atmosphere. Made of durable material that is easy to assemble and hang up. This banner can be reused and easily stored to use in the future.
